title: Genie One enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Account-level Genie customization**: You can now customize Genie at the account level, including colors, a logo, a markdown welcome message, and pinned content. See [Customize the Genie One homepage](/aws/en/genie-one/customize-genie-homepage).
* **Email tool for scheduled tasks**: Scheduled tasks now use an email tool to send emails, enabling more customized email formats and send conditions.
* **Custom MCP server fix (Public Preview)**: Fixed an issue that prevented custom MCP servers from being used in Genie One.
* **Teams and Slack app integration**: You can now use Genie One directly from Microsoft Teams and Slack with the app integration. See [Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams](/aws/en/integrations/msft-teams) and [Databricks Genie app for Slack](/aws/en/genie-one/genie-slack).

ref_links.text: Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams
